name: Steak Au Poivre
recipeInstructions:
1. Coat the steaks on both sides with crushed pepper, pressing to adhere.
2. Cook the steaks in hot butter for 3 minutes on each side.
3. Remove the steaks to a warm platter and season with salt.
4. Pour the wine into the pan to deglaze and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
5. Pour the sauce over the steaks.
